concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用蒙特卡洛模拟来模拟自行车在芝加哥各区域的流动，通过随机数确定每个时间步离开的自行车数量，并跟踪自行车在各区域的分布。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The number of bikes in use at any point in time is randomly determined as a number between zero and the total number of bikes available.

concepts_used.title: 马尔可夫链
concepts_used.how_used: 论文将自行车共享系统建模为马尔可夫链，状态为各区域的自行车数量，转移概率由用户行为（如租车和还车）决定。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We model the movement of bikes as a Markov chain, where the state is the number of bikes at each station.

concepts_used.title: 地理信息可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用芝加哥地图的Voronoi图将城市划分为四个区域（Zone A, B, C, D），并基于此进行自行车分布模拟和可视化。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We created a Voronoi diagram of the region, dividing the city into portions based on proximity to bike stations.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 论文通过改变初始自行车数量、用户兴趣点权重等参数，观察系统性能（如空站或满站概率）的变化，进行灵敏度分析。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We varied the initial number of bikes and the weights of points of interest to see how the system performance changes.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文明确列出了模型假设，如用户不会步行长距离、自行车归还到最近站点、每个站点容量有限等。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumptions: People will not walk long distances; bikes are returned to the nearest station; each station has a capacity limit.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用折线图展示随时间变化的自行车数量，使用柱状图比较不同区域的自行车使用情况，使用地图展示站点分布。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Figure 1 shows the number of bikes over time; Figure 2 compares bike usage across zones.

concepts_used.title: MATLAB 编程基础
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用MATLAB编程实现蒙特卡洛模拟和数据分析，包括随机数生成、循环迭代和结果可视化。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We used MATLAB to run the Monte Carlo simulation and generate the plots.

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用空站或满站的概率作为性能指标，评估不同初始配置和策略的效果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We measured the probability of a station being empty or full as a performance metric.
